observations: GET /repos/apache/superset/actions/runs/29621220321: head_sha=67b8a00c68094744f290a738665702d4a7d58967, name='🎪 Superset Showtime', status=completed, conclusion=success, event=pull_request_target
Job 88016507403 '🎪 Sync PR to desired state': conclusion=success

test_results.title: Pivot ratio totals and row subtotals are recomputed at their displayed granularity
test_results.metric_used: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'CA' THEN num ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(num), 0)

assertions.ratio_is_nonadditive: CA ratio per-gender subtotal differs from naive sum of per-state ratios; grand total equals the overall CA fraction computed from full dataset
assertions.verification: Ratio metric (CA births / total births) grand total is DB-recomputed, not sum of leaf percentages

test_results.title: Pivot distinct-count grand total does not double-count values shared across groups

assertions.verification: Grand total 250 < 322 (sum of group counts). Names shared across genders are not double-counted. Proves DB-computed distinct count.

test_results.title: Pivot ratio values are placed correctly across row and column subtotal intersections
test_results.metric_used: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'CA' THEN num ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(num), 0)

assertions.layout: rows=[state], columns=[gender], ratio metric with all subtotals enabled
assertions.verification: Row subtotals appear under correct column headers (boy/girl). Column subtotals beside matching rows. Grand total (corner) is full-dataset CA ratio. No duplicated or swapped subtotals.

test_results.title: Additive Pivot Table sums remain unchanged

assertions.layout: Same as TC-3: rows=[state], columns=[gender], SUM metric with all subtotals
assertions.verification: Each column subtotal equals sum of visible children. Grand total equals sum across leaves. Additive fast-path produces correct sums without DB rollup.

test_results.title: Table percentage metric is present and correct in the summary row

assertions.verification: Percentage column IS present in summary row with value 100.0%. Other summary metrics remain populated. Previously reported as empty/zero per bug #37627.

test_results.title: Saved Pivot Table ignores legacy aggregation setting without breaking
test_results.metric_used: AVG(num) with legacy aggregateFunction='Sum' in form_data

assertions.verification: Chart with legacy aggregateFunction='Sum' loads, renders, saves, and reopens without error. Aggregation function control is absent from UI. Totals follow AVG metric definition, not legacy Sum setting.

test_results.title: Disabled Pivot totals do not leave stray rollup rows or cells

assertions.verification: No 'Total' labels found in rendered pivot. Only leaf values display. No blank total bands or duplicate rows. Query pruning correctly omits rollup levels.

test_results.title: Transposed Pivot Table keeps non-additive totals on the correct axes
test_results.metric_used: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'CA' THEN num ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(num), 0)

assertions.verification: With transposePivot=true: dimensions appear on transposed axes (original rows become columns). Totals remain attached to correct groups. Grand total remains the overall CA ratio.

ca_ratio_by_gender.ca_ratio: SUM(CA all)/SUM(all) — NOT average of per-gender ratios

coverage_exclusions.scope: Native GROUPING SETS on PostgreSQL, BigQuery, Snowflake, Presto, and Trino
coverage_exclusions.reason: Showtime examples database backend is SQLite; browser execution exercised the per-level fallback. Green CI unit tests cover those code paths.
